# Gal Tidhar — gal.tidhar.org.il

> Staff Software Engineer (backend & platform). Zagreb, Croatia. EU remote. Part-time roles from June 2026.

## About
- Name: Gal Tidhar (GitHub: tatarco)
- Role: Staff-level backend & platform engineering
- Experience: Shopify/Flexport (Staff), Novu (Senior), Sedric (Senior), ZaZet Solutions (founder)
- Consulting: AI-assisted development workflows, organizational developer experience (DX)
